title: Fix N+1 by preloading :posts at query time
prompt: `MyApp.Accounts.ReportGenerator` in `test_fixtures/n_plus_one_comments.ex` iterates over all users and accesses `user.posts` per iteration, triggering an N+1. Fix it by preloading `:posts` at query-build time using `Ecto.Query.preload/3`. Do NOT use `Ecto.Repo.preload/2` in a loop. Write the fix to `lib/my_app/accounts/report_generator.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single-step fix: move preload from runtime iteration to query-build time. A widely known N+1 remedy — pattern appears in the first chapter of every Ecto preload tutorial.
research_citation: AppSignal: 'An N+1 query with 200 users and 200 roles takes 20 seconds; using preload, 600 milliseconds'
